summary: Tested Customer-Presented QR Model payment flow for BidBlitz Pay. All backend APIs working correctly: QR generation, POS payment with multiple QR formats, token reuse prevention, and balance deduction. Staff POS UI Zahlung tab verified working.
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ /api/digital/customer/generate-qr endpoint correctly generates payment tokens with cpt_ prefix
✓ QR data compact format BIDBLITZ:2.0:{token}:{customer}:{timestamp} is correctly generated
✓ /api/pos/payment endpoint correctly handles BIDBLITZ:2.0: format (lines 478-511 in pos_terminal.py)
✓ /api/pos/payment endpoint correctly handles direct cpt_xxxx token format (lines 514-524)
✓ /api/pos/payment endpoint correctly handles legacy BIDBLITZ-PAY: format (lines 454-475)
✓ Token reuse prevention working - used tokens are marked and rejected
✓ Balance deduction correctly updates bidblitz_balance and bidblitz_wallets collections
✓ Staff POS UI shows Zahlung tab with 'Betrag eingeben' and 'Kunden-Barcode scannen' buttons
context_for_next_testing_agent: Customer-Presented QR Model payment flow fully tested and working. Three QR formats supported: 1) BIDBLITZ:2.0:{token}:{customer}:{timestamp}, 2) BIDBLITZ-PAY:{token}, 3) Direct cpt_xxxx token. Staff POS login endpoint is /api/partner-portal/staff/login (not /api/staff/login).

bidblitz_v2_format.description: New compact format for QR scanners

token_security.reuse_prevention: PASS - Used tokens are rejected with 'QR-Code bereits verwendet'
token_security.expiration_validation: PASS - Expired tokens are rejected with 'QR-Code abgelaufen'

staff_pos_ui.zahlung_tab: PASS - Shows 'Zahlung per Barcode' with amount input and scan button
